jira:issue_created.description: Triggered when a new issue is created in a Jira project

jira:issue_updated.description: Triggered when an issue is updated (status, assignee, priority, summary, description, custom fields, etc.)

jira:issue_deleted.description: Triggered when an issue is deleted from a project

comment_created.description: Triggered when a new comment is added to an issue

comment_updated.description: Triggered when a comment on an issue is edited

comment_deleted.description: Triggered when a comment is deleted from an issue

sprint_created.description: Triggered when a new sprint is created in a board

sprint_updated.description: Triggered when a sprint is updated (name, dates, goal, etc.)

sprint_started.description: Triggered when a sprint is started

sprint_closed.description: Triggered when a sprint is completed and closed

sprint_deleted.description: Triggered when a sprint is deleted

board_created.description: Triggered when a new board is created

board_updated.description: Triggered when a board configuration is updated

board_deleted.description: Triggered when a board is deleted

project_created.description: Triggered when a new project is created in Jira

project_updated.description: Triggered when a project is updated (name, lead, description, etc.)

project_deleted.description: Triggered when a project is deleted from Jira

jira:version_created.description: Triggered when a new version (fix version) is created in a project

jira:version_updated.description: Triggered when a version is updated (name, dates, description, etc.)

jira:version_released.description: Triggered when a version is marked as released

jira:version_deleted.description: Triggered when a version is deleted from a project

worklog_created.description: Triggered when a new worklog entry is added to an issue

worklog_updated.description: Triggered when a worklog entry on an issue is edited

worklog_deleted.description: Triggered when a worklog entry is deleted from an issue

attachment_created.description: Triggered when a file is attached to an issue

attachment_deleted.description: Triggered when an attachment is removed from an issue

issuelink_created.description: Triggered when a link is created between two issues

issuelink_deleted.description: Triggered when a link between two issues is removed

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of when the event occurred

webhookEvent.description: The event type identifier (e.g. jira:issue_created, jira:issue_updated)

issue_event_type_name.description: More specific event type name (e.g. issue_created, issue_generic, issue_assigned, issue_updated)

issue.description: The full issue object including id, key, self (API URL), and fields (summary, description, status, priority, assignee, reporter, issuetype, project, created, updated, resolution, labels, components, fixVersions, attachment, comment)

user.description: The user who performed the action. Contains accountId, displayName, emailAddress, avatarUrls, active, and timeZone

changelog.description: The changelog for update events. Contains id and items array where each item has field, fieldtype, fieldId, from, fromString, to, and toString describing what changed

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of when the event occurred

webhookEvent.description: The event type identifier (e.g. comment_created, comment_updated, comment_deleted)

comment.description: The comment object including id, self (API URL), body (in Atlassian Document Format), author, updateAuthor, created, and updated

issue.description: The issue the comment belongs to, including id, key, self, and fields

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of when the event occurred

webhookEvent.description: The event type identifier (e.g. sprint_created, sprint_started, sprint_closed)

sprint.description: The sprint object including id, self (API URL), state (future, active, closed), name, startDate, endDate, completeDate, goal, and originBoardId

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of when the event occurred

webhookEvent.description: The event type identifier (e.g. board_created, board_updated, board_deleted)

board.description: The board object including id, self (API URL), name, and type (scrum or kanban)

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of when the event occurred

webhookEvent.description: The event type identifier (e.g. project_created, project_updated, project_deleted)

project.description: The project object including id, key, self (API URL), name, description, lead, projectTypeKey, and avatarUrls

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of when the event occurred

webhookEvent.description: The event type identifier (e.g. jira:version_created, jira:version_released)

version.description: The version object including id, self (API URL), name, description, released (boolean), releaseDate, startDate, archived (boolean), and projectId

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of when the event occurred

webhookEvent.description: The event type identifier (e.g. worklog_created, worklog_updated, worklog_deleted)

worklog.description: The worklog object including id, self (API URL), author, updateAuthor, timeSpent, timeSpentSeconds, started, created, updated, and issueId

issue.description: The issue the worklog belongs to, including id, key, self, and fields
